scripts.test:local: KEYPAIR=$(solana config get | grep Keypair | cut -b 15-) && cross-env SIGNER=$(cat $KEYPAIR) RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8899 mocha --import=tsx tests/**/*.ts
scripts.test:devnet: KEYPAIR=$(solana config get | grep Keypair | cut -b 15-) && cross-env SIGNER=$(cat $KEYPAIR) RPC_URL=${RPC_URL:-https://api.devnet.solana.com} mocha --import=tsx tests/**/*.ts
scripts.test:mainnet: KEYPAIR=$(solana config get | grep Keypair | cut -b 15-) && cross-env SIGNER=$(cat $KEYPAIR) RPC_URL=${RPC_URL:-https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com} MODE=${MODE:-simulate} mocha --import=tsx tests/**/*.ts
